description: Recommend what to work on next by scanning all projects, plans, backlog, and proposals. Use when: "/next", "what should I work on", "what's the highest priority", "what to pick up now", "I have N hours — what fits?", "下一步做什麼", "最高優先是什麼", "現在該做什麼", or right after archiving a completed project. Not for: creating plans, starting implementation, or running quality checks.

results.query: what should I work on next? check the backlog, open plans, and in-progress projects.
I just finished and archived the allowance engine project. What's the highest priority thing to pick up now?
I have 2 hours before a meeting. What's the best S-size task I can knock out from the backlog?
start implementing the monthly settlement scheduler. the plan is already approved.
create a detailed plan for the notification system — phases, architecture, migration steps, rollback strategy
run the full quality checks on my branch before merging
let's brainstorm what features to build for the next quarter — notification system, advanced reporting, mobile app?
give me a retro on the last week — velocity, test ratio, what shipped
